results.rendered_html:
nalinī
1 A lotus-plant; na parvatāgre nalinī prarohati  Mk. 4. 17 ;
(pb) nalinīdalagatajalamatitaralaṃ  Moha M. 5 ;  Ku. 4 6. 
2 An assemblage of lotuses.
3 A pond or place abounding in lotuses.
4 A lotus or the stalk of it.
5 The celestial Ganges.
6 The intoxicating juice of the cocoa-nut.
Comp.
— khaṃḍaṃ, -ṣaṃḍaṃ a group or assemblage of lotuses.
— ruhaḥ an epithet of Brahmā.
— (haṃ) a lotus-stalk, the fibres of a lotus.
